description: Plugin-distributed hooks for physical-therapy-rehab-clinic. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 3 PT/rehab documentation smells (timed minutes with no units, 'tolerated well' boilerplate, a plan of care with no cert/recert date). Set PTCLINIC_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
